message:
fix(fwc): fall back to FCP2 principal_id claim and fix circuit breaker error_rate test

Two fixes:

main.rs / resolve_live_auth:
- When CWT subject claim is absent, fall back to FCP2 principal_id
  claim (-65540) for identity resolution. Some capability tokens use
  the FCP2-specific claim instead of the standard CWT sub, causing
  auth to silently produce no subject.

reactive_rules.rs:
- Fix circuit_error_rate test: 3 failures out of 13 total operations
  (10 successes + 3 failures) is 23%, not 30%. The test was computing
  the rate as failures/successes rather than failures/total. Rename
  test to circuit_error_rate_mixed to clarify it tests mixed workload.
- Fix confusion_unknown_flag_shows_similar_flags test: clap errors may
  bypass JSON mode, so switch from execute_json to execute_text and
  assert the error output mentions the flag or alternatives.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
